content: اَلنَّهَارِدَة كَانَ يَوْمًا طَوِيلًا جِدًّا فِي الْمَزْرَعَة
translations: eng:today was a very long day at the farm

transcriptions.arabizi: ilnahardah kaen yoom taweel giddan fiilmazraAa
